opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I scratched my leg yesterday, and now it feels like acid is burning deep inside my muscle, and the redness is spreading by the hour!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain is unbearable and completely out of keeping with what looks like a tiny scratch, and the red area is getting bigger fast with dark blisters coming up.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago, after a minor scratch in the garden
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day and getting dramatically worse in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, burning, agonising pain — like acid inside the muscle — far worse than the small scratch should cause
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain he has ever felt; he is groaning, can't keep still and can't bear any weight on the leg
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right lower leg, but the redness keeps spreading up and around
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and escalating hour by hour
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — ordinary paracetamol did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it keeps worsening on its own no matter what he does
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he feels feverish, hot and shivery, wiped out and terrible in himself; his wife says he has become muddled and drowsy in the last hour
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; it started from just a garden scratch
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, can't stand or walk, groaning in pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: does some gardening; lives with spouse who is present and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: the red area on his lower leg is spreading fast — it has already crept well past the pen line my husband drew around it two hours ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's visual estimate; edge marked with a pen at home, not a measured margin

objective_data_offered.value: dark, blood-filled blisters have come up in the middle of the red patch
the skin in the centre is going a dark grey-purple colour
the leg is hot, tight and swollen and I can't put any weight on it
he's gone confused and keeps drifting off, and he's drenched in sweat and shivering
his heart feels like it's racing and he looks really unwell and grey
